case_title: PANG, CHUN HUNG VS LAM, MAN YEUNG

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PANG, CHUN HUNG AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, MAN YEUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-20-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-02-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, MAN YEUNG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PANG, CHUN HUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, MAN YEUNG $3,524.40 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,629.40, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE IN THE SUM OF $1598.40, AND BODILY INJURY IN THE SUM OF $1926.00. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PAYMENTS PREVIOUSLY MADE TO PLAINTIFF ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF FOR PROPERTY LOSS OR BODILY INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF'S DECLARATION FILED. DEFT NOT SERVED. RE-SET NEW COURT DATE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, MAN YEUNG
